Earlier, analysts at Bernstein and BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes also projected Bitcoin to reach new record highs in 2026.

# Singapore Revokes Bsquared Crypto License Over Breaches

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | May 20, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal

# Tether Acquires $200M SoftBank Stake in Bitcoin Firm

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | May 20, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
Tether has bought out SoftBank Group Inc.’s ownership in the digital-asset treasury company Twenty One Capital Inc., adding to its control over the Bitcoin accumulator as it seeks to merge the firm with two other businesses.

## ⚡ Why This Matters (The Macro View)
While most outlets report the 'what', our intelligence engine focuses on the 'why'. This development in Markets isn't just a news item; it's a structural pivot.
